title: Imperial Guard (disambiguation)
content:
'''Imperial Guard''' may refer to:
==Canon==
*'''[[Emperor's Royal Guard]]''', a guard that protected the [[Galactic Emperor]] [[Darth Sidious|Sheev Palpatine]]
*'''[[Imperial royal guard]]''', a group of [[clone commando]]s
*[[Praetorian Guard|'''Imperial Praetorian Guard''']], a guard used by [[Gideon's Imperial remnant]]
*'''[[Coruscant Guard]]''', a guard stationed on the [[planet]] [[Coruscant]]

==Legends==
*'''[[Coruscant Guard/Legends|Coruscant Guard]]:''' a [[Clone shock trooper/Legends|clone trooper]]/[[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|police force]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] called the "Imperial Guard" during the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]
*'''[[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Emperor's Royal Guard]]:''' also called the "Imperial Guard" or "Imperial Royal Guard" they were the elite bodyguards of [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]
*'''[[Imperial Guard]]:''' the elite guard of the [[Tenebrae|Sith Emperor]] who ruled the resurrected [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]]
*'''[[New Imperial Guard]]:''' the elite guard of the short-lived [[New Empire]] under [[Darth Malgus]]

{{Disambig}}
